name: Fruited Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
3. To prepare Fruited rice, portion out 1 cup of the mix into a heavy saucepan.
4. Add 2 cups water and 2 tablespoons butter or margarine.
5. Cover tightly and bring to a boil over medium heat.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer without lifting the lid for 30 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
7. Yield: about 3 1/2 cups of cooked rice.
